description_long: This is a compact, tracked combat vehicle with a low-profile, angular armored hull and a prominent, elongated cannon mounted on a central turret. The vehicle features two large, continuous rubber tracks on either side, supported by multiple road wheels, providing stability and traction over rough terrain. The hull and turret are constructed from thick, flat metal plates with visible rivets and seams, suggesting reinforced armor. The front and sides of the vehicle are sloped for deflection, and there are subtle signs of weathering and rust on the metal surfaces. The color scheme is a uniform light gray, with no visible camouflage or military insignia. The design is utilitarian, focusing on protection and firepower, suitable for urban or battlefield deployment.
description: A compact, tracked combat vehicle with a long central cannon, sloped armored hull, and large rubber tracks. The exterior is light gray with visible rivets and weathering.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon, the sloped turret, and the continuous rubber track with multiple road wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide stance, sloped armor, and the central positioning of the cannon barrel between the tracks.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the track system and the turret's angular design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the armored hull, the ends of the tracks, and the absence of visible hatches or markings.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, flat, sloped steel plates; visible rivets and seams; no modular or reactive panels apparent.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid light gray color.
